item.title: Rolls-Royce Restoration Project Begins
item.description: A classic Rolls-Royce needs extensive work to restore its performance and appearance. Watch the inspection, repairs, and restoration process in detail.

media:content.media:title: Rolls-Royce Restoration Project Begins
media:content.media:description: A classic Rolls-Royce needs extensive work to restore its performance and appearance. Watch the inspection, repairs, and restoration process in detail.

item.title: I Bought Something New!
item.description: Watch as I reveal and explore a recent purchase. See the unboxing, first impressions, and potential uses of this new item.

media:content.media:title: I Bought Something New!
media:content.media:description: Watch as I reveal and explore a recent purchase. See the unboxing, first impressions, and potential uses of this new item.

item.title: Coolant Drips in Action
item.description: Watch coolant drip and circulate during engine testing or maintenance. Learn how to monitor levels and address leaks to keep vehicles running safely.

media:content.media:title: Coolant Drips in Action
media:content.media:description: Watch coolant drip and circulate during engine testing or maintenance. Learn how to monitor levels and address leaks to keep vehicles running safely.

item.title: Car Wiz Tales: 6 Cars, 6 Lessons
item.description: Discover life lessons through the stories of six different cars. Insights, experiences, and wisdom from automotive adventures and challenges.

media:content.media:title: Car Wiz Tales: 6 Cars, 6 Lessons
media:content.media:description: Discover life lessons through the stories of six different cars. Insights, experiences, and wisdom from automotive adventures and challenges.

item.title: Cheap Parts Are Hurting Modern Cars
item.description: Explore how low-quality parts are affecting the longevity of today’s cars. A look at reliability issues, maintenance challenges, and what it means for drivers.

media:content.media:title: Cheap Parts Are Hurting Modern Cars
media:content.media:description: Explore how low-quality parts are affecting the longevity of today’s cars. A look at reliability issues, maintenance challenges, and what it means for drivers.

item.title: Visible Rub Marks on the Vehicle
item.description: Inspecting a vehicle reveals noticeable rub marks. Learn what causes them, how to prevent further damage, and ways to repair or minimize their appearance.

media:content.media:title: Visible Rub Marks on the Vehicle
media:content.media:description: Inspecting a vehicle reveals noticeable rub marks. Learn what causes them, how to prevent further damage, and ways to repair or minimize their appearance.

item.title: These Cars Were Common, Not Rare
item.description: A look at cars that many think are rare but were actually widely produced. Discover why perception differs from reality in the automotive world.

media:content.media:title: These Cars Were Common, Not Rare
media:content.media:description: A look at cars that many think are rare but were actually widely produced. Discover why perception differs from reality in the automotive world.

item.title: Fixing an Audi TT After Poor Service
item.description: Watch as an Audi TT is repaired after another shop’s mistakes left the owner $800 out. See the inspection, corrections, and lessons for proper automotive care.

media:content.media:title: Fixing an Audi TT After Poor Service
media:content.media:description: Watch as an Audi TT is repaired after another shop’s mistakes left the owner $800 out. See the inspection, corrections, and lessons for proper automotive care.

item.title: 5 Reasons Car Repairs Take Too Long
item.description: Explore the top five reasons vehicle repairs often take longer than expected. From parts delays to shop workload, learn why timelines can stretch and how to plan ahead.

media:content.media:title: 5 Reasons Car Repairs Take Too Long
media:content.media:description: Explore the top five reasons vehicle repairs often take longer than expected. From parts delays to shop workload, learn why timelines can stretch and how to plan ahead.

item.title: Remembering When These Cars Were New
item.description: A nostalgic look back at cars that were once new and popular. Reflect on their design, impact, and the memories they bring from past automotive eras.

media:content.media:title: Remembering When These Cars Were New
media:content.media:description: A nostalgic look back at cars that were once new and popular. Reflect on their design, impact, and the memories they bring from past automotive eras.

item.title: Ford Raptor After 300,000 Miles
item.description: See how a Ford Raptor holds up after 300,000 miles of use. A detailed look at wear, maintenance, and the durability of this high-performance truck over time.

media:content.media:title: Ford Raptor After 300,000 Miles
media:content.media:description: See how a Ford Raptor holds up after 300,000 miles of use. A detailed look at wear, maintenance, and the durability of this high-performance truck over time.

item.title: Chevrolet Cars to Buy (and Avoid)
item.description: Explore the best and worst Chevrolet cars to consider. Learn which models are reliable buys and which ones to avoid based on performance, value, and owner experiences.

media:content.media:description: Explore the best and worst Chevrolet cars to consider. Learn which models are reliable buys and which ones to avoid based on performance, value, and owner experiences.
